case_title: QIANG ZHONG WU VS. HIN LEUNG LAU ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, QIANG ZHONG

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-04-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF QIANG ZHONG WU IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT MUN SUN LAU IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MUN SUN LAU IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED SEP-25-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, MUN SUN

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MUN SUN LAU, SON. DEFENDANT HING LEUNG LAU IS DECEASED (CERTIFICATE OF DEATH) PROVIDED IN COURT BY MUN SUN LAU. FILED BY DEFENDANT LAU, HIN LEUNG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, QIANG ZHONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAU, HIN LEUNG $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, AS TO DEFENDANT HIN LEUNG LAU'S ESTATE ONLY. CLAIM AS TO DEFENDANT MUN SUN LAU IS DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - HIN LEUNG LAU. (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - VACANT - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WU, QIANG ZHONG AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, HIN LEUNG LAU, MUN SUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY WU, QIANG ZHONG LAU, HIN LEUNG LAU, MUN SUN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF QIANG ZHONG WU IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY PROVISIONALLY QUALIFIED CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT HIN LEUNG LAU IS NOT PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SECOND DEFENDANT MUN SUN LAU (SON). DEFENDANT MUN SUN LAU IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER WINNIE CHAN (#785540). DEFENDANT MUN SUN LAU INFORMS THE COURT THAT HIS FATHER HIN LEUNG LAU IS DECEASED AND PROVIDED IN COURT THE DEATH CERTIFICATE OF HIN LEUNG LAU. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2022 - JUDGMENT.
